steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage says some historians suggest Maya mathematicians inherited the zero symbol from the Olmec civilization. Find the choice that accurately reflects this claim.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — Maya civilization acquired the use of zero from the Olmec civilization.: 'Acquired' matches 'inherited' — both mean received from a prior source. Directly supported by the passage. ✓
  • Choice B — Maya civilization respected its historians more than it respected its mathematicians.: the passage makes no comparison of respect between groups. ✗
  • Choice C — Maya civilization was highly secretive about its intellectual achievements.: no mention of secrecy anywhere in the passage. ✗
  • Choice D — Maya civilization tried to introduce its writing system to other civilizations.: the passage is about a symbol for zero, not a writing system promotion. ✗
That is the correct answer.
